blended.narrative: Winter Park is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,127 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 7" over the past week. Current depth: 39".
